steps.name: Click locator('a[href="/login"]').filter({ has: locator('.navbar-login-item') }).first().or(getByRole('link', { name: 'Log In' }))
Wait for selector locator('div.main-content section[class*="container-business-personal"] div.container.title-bar h1')
Wait for selector locator('div.main-content section[class*="container-business-personal"] ul.nav-tabs li.active div.nav-tab-content').filter({ hasText: 'Dashboard' })
Expect "toBe"
